name: Butterscotch Oat Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the oats and brown sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the melted butter and vanilla to the oat mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Divide the mixture evenly between two ungreased 8-inch square pans, spreading it out evenly. Alternatively, place the mixture in a single pan for thicker, chewier squares.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 10 minutes if using two pans, or 15 minutes if using a single pan. The bars are done when they turn golden-brown.
5. Allow the bars to cool for 5 minutes before cutting them into squares with a sharp knife.
6. Loosen the edges of the bars and let them cool completely in the pans before removing them.
